Package neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion

Class MechanisticCorrosionModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion.MechanisticCorrosionModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MechanisticCorrosionModel extends Object implements Serializable
Mechanistic CO2 corrosion model that combines a kinetic NORSOK M-506 baseline with Nesic-style mass-transfer limitation and a Langmuir adsorption inhibitor isotherm.

Three serial resistances control the observed corrosion rate of carbon steel under sweet (CO2) service:

  1. Charge-transfer kinetics — captured by the NORSOK M-506 (2005/2017) baseline rate CR_kinetic which already accounts for fugacity, pH, scaling temperature and wall shear.
  2. Boundary-layer mass transfer — described by the Berger-Hau correlation for Sherwood number in turbulent pipe flow, Sh = 0.0165 * Re^0.86 * Sc^0.33, giving a mass-transfer coefficient k_m = Sh * D_CO2 / d. The mass-transfer-limited rate is CR_MT = k_m * c_CO2 * 11.6 mm/yr per mol/L (Nesic 2007).
  3. Inhibitor surface coverage — governed by a Langmuir adsorption isotherm (see LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm).
The mixed-control rate before inhibition is 
 1 / CR_mixed = 1 / CR_kinetic + 1 / CR_MT
and after inhibitor coverage theta: 
 CR_inhibited = CR_mixed * (1 - theta_max * theta)

Standards: NORSOK M-506 (2017), NACE SP0775 (corrosion coupon practice).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Method
    Description
    MechanisticCorrosionModel
    evaluate()
    Runs the full mechanistic calculation: NORSOK kinetic baseline → mass-transfer-limited rate → mixed control → Langmuir inhibition.
    double

    Returns the final inhibited rate.
    double

    Returns the Langmuir surface coverage.

    Returns the inhibition efficiency theta_max * theta.

    Returns the Reynolds number.
    double

    Returns the Schmidt number.
    double

    Returns the Sherwood number from Berger-Hau (or 3.66 if laminar).

    Returns standards used by this model.

    Returns true once evaluate() has been invoked.

      h2s - H2S mole fraction

    • setWaterChemistry

      public MechanisticCorrosionModel setWaterChemistry(double pH, double bicarbMgL, double ionicStrength)
      Sets aqueous-phase chemistry.
      Parameters:
      pH - pH value (use -1 to compute equilibrium pH from CO2)
      bicarbMgL - bicarbonate concentration [mg/L]
      ionicStrength - ionic strength [mol/L]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setFlow

      public MechanisticCorrosionModel setFlow(double velocityMs, double diameterM, double densityKgM3, double viscosityPas)
      Sets pipe and flow geometry.
      Parameters:
      velocityMs - flow velocity [m/s]
      diameterM - pipe ID [m]
      densityKgM3 - liquid density [kg/m3]
      viscosityPas - dynamic viscosity [Pa.s]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • setInhibitor

      public MechanisticCorrosionModel setInhibitor(LangmuirInhibitorIsotherm inhibitor, double doseMgL)
      Sets the inhibitor model and dose.
      Parameters:
      inhibitor - Langmuir isotherm (use null to keep default imidazoline)
      doseMgL - inhibitor dose [mg/L]
      Returns:
      this for chaining

    • evaluate

      public MechanisticCorrosionModel evaluate()
      Runs the full mechanistic calculation: NORSOK kinetic baseline → mass-transfer-limited rate → mixed control → Langmuir inhibition.
      Returns:
      this for chaining
